user.title: Hue Entertainment
user.description: Enter the IP address of your Hue bridge. It will be auto-filled if discovered.

link.title: Link with Hue bridge
link.description: Press the button on your Hue bridge at **{bridge_ip}**, then click Submit.

error.link_button_not_pressed: Bridge button not pressed — try again.
error.link_failed: Failed to connect to the bridge. Check the IP address.

start_effect.name: Start effect
start_effect.description: Start a lighting effect on a Hue entertainment group.

effect.name: Effect
effect.description: Strobe, Flash, Pulse, Color Cycle, Candle, Police, or Confetti.

flash_count.name: Flash count
flash_count.description: Number of flashes for the Flash effect (default 3).

cycle_speed.name: Cycle speed
cycle_speed.description: Colour rotation speed for Color Cycle (default 0.1).

stop.name: Stop streaming
stop.description: Stop the active effect and return lights to normal.
